rationale.D1: YAGSL provides a vendored swerve abstraction (confirmed via SwerveSubsystem.java importing swervelib), but all mechanism subsystems (Turret, Intake, Indexer) own SparkMax motors directly with no IO interface — grep found zero 'interface.*IO' hits.
rationale.D2: A Superstructure class exists but confirmed to be a command-factory holder (wraps StartEndCommand/RunCommand calls on subsystem methods) with no goal enum, state transitions, or kinematic guarding; bindings are direct command composition in RobotContainer.
rationale.D3: simulationPeriodic() is an empty stub in both Robot.java and SwerveSubsystem.java; no WPILib physics sim classes (ElevatorSim, DCMotorSim, etc.) appear anywhere in the codebase.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory exists at all; zero test files, zero assertions, no CI workflow.
rationale.D5: Only active logging is SmartDashboard.putData('Field', field2d) in SwerveSubsystem and an Elastic layout JSON in deploy; the comprehensive DashboardPublisher.java is entirely commented out; no AdvantageKit, DogLog, or Epilogue.
rationale.D6: PathPlanner paths and autos are authored (9 files confirmed) and AutoBuilder is configured with real constraints in SwerveSubsystem; pathfindToPose is wired in alignToOffset; however getAutonomousCommand() bypasses PathPlannerAuto and uses a manual ShootAuto command sequence instead.
rationale.D7: addVisionMeasurement is actively called in SwerveSubsystem.periodic() using Limelight MegaTag1 pose+timestamp (confirmed line 115); alignToOffset uses MegaTag2 for tag-relative pathfinding; no std-dev tuning or IO interface for vision.
rationale.D8: A substantive README exists describing the full stack, build/deploy instructions, and known issues; no .github/workflows CI, no spotless/checkstyle in build.gradle; Elastic layout JSON is committed.

D1: src/main/java/frc/robot/subsystems/Turret.java:3 — SparkMax imported and owned directly, no IO interface
D2: src/main/java/frc/robot/Superstructure.java:13 — class holds subsystem refs and returns StartEndCommand/RunCommand, no state enum or transitions
src/main/java/frc/robot/RobotContainer.java:112 — direct button-to-command bindings with no Superstructure goal API
D3: src/main/java/frc/robot/Robot.java:138 — simulationInit() and simulationPeriodic() are empty stubs
D4: src/test — directory does not exist; no test files found anywhere in repo
D5: src/main/java/frc/robot/subsystems/SwerveSubsystem.java:73 — SmartDashboard.putData('Field', field2d) only active dashboard call
D8: README.md:1 — substantive README with build instructions and known issues listed
